heading: Officers: voluntary retirement for length of service
label: 20601 Officers: voluntary retirement for length of service

children.heading: .—Twenty Years or More
children.label: a .—Twenty Years or More
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may, upon the officer’s request, retire a commissioned officer of the Space Force who has at least 20 years of service computed under , at least 10 years of which have been active service as a commissioned officer.section 20602 of this title

children.heading: .—Thirty Years or More
children.label: b .—Thirty Years or More
children.text: A commissioned officer of the Space Force who has at least 30 years of service computed under may be retired upon the officer’s request, in the discretion of the President.section 20602 of this title

children.heading: .—Forty Years or More
children.label: c .—Forty Years or More
children.text: Except as provided in , a commissioned officer of the Space Force who has at least 40 years of service computed under shall be retired upon the officer’s request.section 20503 of this titlesection 20602 of this title
